title: Blog management title links to slug pages
scope: Make blog titles in admin blog management table clickable links
Open blog article slug URLs in a new browser tab
Record work order completion in CHANGELOG.md
acceptance_criteria: Each blog title in admin blog management links to the corresponding /blog/<slug> URL
Title links open in a new browser tab/window
CHANGELOG.md includes an entry for this work order
risk_notes: Posts without slugs remain non-clickable until slug data is present
rollback_plan: Revert commits associated with this work order
